description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
A cybernetical replacement leg. Comes with a free foot.
While running your movement is increased by 6m/yds. Must be paired.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-4 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are reduced/improved by 1 for each BODY point the wearer has above 6 (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab).. Does not ablate while at or above 13 SP unless damage exceeds SP, the blow is from a melee weapon, or AP ammo is used.
An Exotic Shotgun that uses the Heavy Weapons Skill. Refer to the full item description on pg. 348.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.

A monowire with a serrated hook is fired from a wrist-mounted medium pistol, its feed reeling in automatically after a miss. 10m range. On a successful ranged attack the target is grappled. At the start of the user's turn, they can choose to pull the target 5m towards the brawler. Reloads automatically the turn after a miss, but cannot be put away until reloaded.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
A concealable one-handed Ranged Weapon. Can't hold anything with this hand while activated.
A concealable one-handed Ranged Weapon. Can't hold anything with this hand while activated.
Thermite rounds bury themselves into a target and briefly ignite. Add +1 damage to the attack. If a 1 is rolled while firing, the weapon jams.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 5x/Special Boss Threat - An isolated, specialized, high-level agent that will likely pose a significant threat even without any backup.

Gang-Wide Ability - Audience In A Can: Any time a Prime-Time Player succeeds an opposed check or an attack roll, canned laughter or applause will play in the background. The opposed party must make a Cool save (roll 1d10 - a result less or equal to the player's Cool stat passes; use 1/2 lowdown for NPCs); on failure, they take a -2 to their next check. This effect stacks once.

Ability - Rubberhose: Every Cartoonist is a psycho who's gone completely over the edge, driven there by the gang and the madness of the world, and have embraced cyberware to become a dystopian caricature of their favorite cartoons. They ignore damage inflicted by critical injuries.

Extra Gear - Choose One:

  • A flamethrower, 12 incendiary shells, and a cyberarm equipped with the Bloodthirster with 1 reusable Bloodthirster Hook & Wire

  • A pair of cyberarms, each equipped with a popup SMG, and 160 Thermite medium pistol rounds. While wielding these, the Cartoonist can make 2 autofire, suppressive fire, or normal shot actions a turn, in any combination.

I… just… euugh...
